200# return «
choose a throne:

Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: T213


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Caged Mind Elder Totem

Once in a while, fiery meteors fall upon 3 random random enemy units. Upon hitting an enemy, a meteor starts incinerating the target for 2 sec. The enemy unit starts receiving 46250 pure damage every second for 2 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the incinerated unit receive pure damage equal to 50% of the damage received by the original target. Once the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 30% for 2 sec. Meteors also explode upon hitting enemy units, dealing 87500 pure damage to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

- Level 20
Once in a while, fiery meteors fall upon 3 random random enemy units. Upon hitting an enemy, a meteor starts incinerating the target for 3 sec. The enemy unit starts receiving 92500 pure damage every second for 3 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the incinerated unit receive pure damage equal to 60% of the damage received by the original target. Once the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 35% for 3 sec. Meteors also explode upon hitting enemy units, dealing 175000 pure damage to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

- Level 40
Once in a while, fiery meteors fall upon 3 random random enemy units. Upon hitting an enemy, a meteor starts incinerating the target for 4 sec. The enemy unit starts receiving 185000 pure damage every second for 4 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the incinerated unit receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original target. Once the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 4 sec. Meteors also explode upon hitting enemy units, dealing 350000 pure damage to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 90

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
